evals.expected_output: Runs data profiler first; classifies complexity; recommends starting with baseline model; includes split strategy.
assertions: Always runs data profiler before model/feature advice.
Specifies train/test split and leakage checks.
Includes effect size + assumptions for stats.

evals.prompt: Build the airflow dag to load the warehouse
evals.expected_output: Handoff: ETL to other (data-pipeline-architect or devops); not this skill.
assertions: Scopes to EDA/ML/model; not ETL or DB design.

evals.prompt: /data-wizard design an A/B test for the new checkout
evals.expected_output: Includes power analysis, CUPED if applicable, walk-forward for time series.
Assesses current maturity; does not recommend Level 3 for Level 0.

evals.prompt: Use yesterday's outcome as a feature for tomorrow's prediction
evals.expected_output: Flags post-outcome / leakage risk; refuses to treat as valid feature.
assertions: Explicitly flags features derived from post-outcome data as leakage.
